item.title:
BenDinnery: Ben Dinnery @BenDinnery · 27min [..] #LFC #UCL
Curtis Jones did train with the group ahead of the PSG tie this evening
item.description:
Ben Dinnery @BenDinnery · 27min [..] #LFC #UCL
Curtis Jones did train with the group ahead of the PSG tie this evening, and barring a reaction, he will be involved…
Definitely missing out for the Reds - Stefan Bajcetic, Alisson Becker, Conor Bradley, Wataru Endo and Giovanni Leoni. Cita Ben Dinnery @BenDinnery · 19h Arne Slot. #LFC
On Curtis Jones…
‘He felt a little bit his groin. It wasn't the moment – he felt it already for a few minutes. So, let's hope for the best but I would be surprised if a player who comes off that he's available for Tuesday.’
Alisson will definitely miss 1 2 mil

item.title: ManUtd: Manchester United @ManUtd · 2h It's Altay's birthday 134 112 1 mil 43 mil
item.description: Manchester United @ManUtd · 2h It's Altay's birthday 134 112 1 mil 43 mil

Welbeck. Maybe: Van Hecke
Rice + Keane + Gavrdiol + Abraham 18 6 mil

item.title: City_Xtra: City Xtra @City_Xtra · 4h #ManCity are ‘getting closer’ to signing Palmeiras winger, Eduardo Conceição and want to reach
item.description:
City Xtra @City_Xtra · 4h #ManCity are ‘getting closer’ to signing Palmeiras winger, Eduardo Conceição and want to reach an agreement ‘as soon as possible’ worth close to €40M for the 16-year-old. Source linked to Conceição: "All the greats in Europe want him."
[via @felipee_sil ] 21 52 1 mil 30 mil
